releaseNotesMarkdown:
Comparing against published beta build beta-2026.0428.1314
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

_No commits since last build._

### Forge Tools improvements

- Patrol(velvetforge): add terminal periods to 5 empty-state messages
- Patrol(conciergeforge): polish PatchNotesWindow export error with specific exception types
- Patrol(crown): polish ExportButton label in CadForgeWindow from 'Forge DWGs' to 'Export DWGs'
- Patrol(shimmerweave): Add ShadowBreathAnim storyboard and wire into StartBreathAnimation/StopBreathAnimation
- Patrol(charm): added placeholder + tooltips to SpatialForgeWindow toolbar
- Patrol(bellows): fix TextTrimming overflow in ViewportPositionQuickSelectWindow and add DropShadowEffect cleanup in RegionForgeWindow OnClosing
- Forge(quickforge): cache pulse history animations and timer — no per-call allocs
- Peer(anvilwyrm): fix indentation drift in HidePulseHistory ReduceMotion block

_(+ 7 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
